message:
test(runtime): E2E Policy-as-Data progressive delivery and fallback (bd-382tk.1)

Add 6 integration tests validating Recipe F policy-as-data controllers:
- Progressive delivery (shadow→canary→ramp→default) with divergence logging
- Fallback on invalid/corrupt policy (validation rejects, immediate revert)
- Evidence ledger with monotonic switch IDs and old/new chain
- Concurrent shadow-run safety under 4 reader + 1 writer threads
- JSONL schema compliance for all decision log fields
- No dropped frames during fallback transition

240 policy decisions across 80 frames, 60 shadow divergences detected,
10% canary loaded rate verified, zero panics under concurrency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
